description: A digital composition featuring a simple drum groove, two guitars (one strumming chords and the other playing a melody), an e-bass, a piano playing chord progressions, and a trumpet playing a loud melody. The instruments sound flat and are likely synthesized. Bongo hits are subtly present in the left channel. Background noises include eating sounds and a stomach rumbling.
accompaniment: Guitars, Piano, E-bass, Digital Drums, Bongos
vocal_presence: None, but includes non-musical sounds like eating and stomach rumbling
